name: powershell_core
installerCommands: msiexec /quiet /i PowerShell-7.4.11-win-x64.msi ENABLE_PSREMOTING=0 REGISTER_MANIFEST=1 DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 USE_MU=0 ENABLE_MU=0 LAUNCHAPPONEXIT=0
msiexec /quiet /i PowerShell-7.4.11-win-x86.msi ENABLE_PSREMOTING=0 REGISTER_MANIFEST=1 DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 USE_MU=0 ENABLE_MU=0 LAUNCHAPPONEXIT=0

name: quicktime72
installerCommands: QuickTimeInstaller.exe ALLUSERS=1 DESKTOP_SHORTCUTS=0 QTTaskRunFlags=0 QTINFO.BISQTPRO=1 SCHEDULE_ASUW=0 REBOOT_REQUIRED=No /qn
